intro: Tripolion tenellum, also known as Tripolium, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and improve immune function. The bioactive constituents of Tripolium tenellum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Tripolium is often prepared as a tea or used in tinctures, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in infusions and decoctions to support respiratory health and immune function.
